questions.question: A bank management system is designed to store customer information, process transactions, and generate reports. What is a functional requirement of this system?
options: A) The system should be user-friendly
B) The system should be able to process transactions securely
C) The system should store customer information
D) The system should be able to generate reports daily
questions.explanation: Functional requirement is a requirement that describes what the system should do.

questions.question: A bank management system is designed to process 1000 transactions per hour. What is a nonfunctional requirement of this system?
options: A) The system should be able to process 1000 transactions per hour
B) The system should be able to store customer information securely
C) The system should be user-friendly
D) The system should be able to process transactions in under 1 second
questions.explanation: Nonfunctional requirement is a requirement that describes how the system should behave, such as security or performance.

questions.question: A bank management system is designed to store customer information. What is a functional requirement of this system?
options: A) The system should be user-friendly
B) The system should store customer information
C) The system should be able to process transactions securely
D) The system should be able to generate reports daily
questions.explanation: Functional requirement is a requirement that describes what the system should do.

questions.question: A bank management system is designed to operate 24/7. What is a nonfunctional requirement of this system?
options: A) The system should be able to process 1000 transactions per hour
B) The system should be able to store customer information securely
C) The system should be user-friendly
D) The system should be able to operate 24/7
questions.explanation: Nonfunctional requirement is a requirement that describes how the system should behave, such as security or performance.

questions.question: A bank management system is designed to generate reports daily. What is a functional requirement of this system?
options: A) The system should be user-friendly
B) The system should store customer information
C) The system should be able to process transactions securely
D) The system should be able to generate reports daily
questions.explanation: Functional requirement is a requirement that describes what the system should do.
